problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
